narrative.headline: Slickdeals frontpage, coupons, and recommendations from your terminal — agent-native, MCP-compatible, locally cacheable.
narrative.value_prop: Wraps Slickdeals' Nuxt frontpage JSON endpoints (featured-coupons, missed-deals, promoted-content, recommendations) in a Go CLI with agent-native --json output, local SQLite cache for offline search, and a companion MCP server. v0.1 is read-only; authenticated write features (vote/comment/submit/DM) are deferred to v0.2.
narrative.auth_narrative: v0.1 uses no authentication — all wrapped endpoints are public Nuxt JSON feeds. Future versions will support Chrome cookie import for personalized and write features.

quickstart.comment: Verify the binary and HTTP transport are healthy.
Pull the missed-deals carousel as structured JSON.
Pull discovered endpoints into the local SQLite cache for offline search.
Full-text search across the locally-synced data.

troubleshoots.fix: Slickdeals occasionally throttles per-IP. Wait a minute and retry; the discovered endpoints work via plain HTTPS (no clearance cookie needed per probe-reachability).
Run `slickdeals-pp-cli sync` first to populate the local cache, then retry.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when you need agent-native access to Slickdeals frontpage data — recommendations, coupons, missed deals — as JSON. The v0.1 release wraps Slickdeals' Nuxt JSON endpoints discovered via browser-sniff. For full deal-tracking with keyword alerts, watch lists, compound queries, and authenticated write actions (vote/comment/submit/DM), wait for v0.2 or contribute via the printing-press-library.

recipes.title: Pull missed deals as JSON for an agent
recipes.explanation: Returns the structured missed-deals carousel — useful as input to a downstream filtering agent.

recipes.title: Sync and search locally
recipes.explanation: Build a local cache, then run FTS5 search against it offline.

recipes.title: Programmatic frontpage recommendations
recipes.explanation: Get the recommendation-carousel entries as structured JSON.

gaps: RSS-driven hot/frontpage/category/search commands not yet implemented (would supplement Nuxt JSON endpoints)
Keyword alerts and watch lists not yet implemented
Compound store + thumbs + freshness queries deferred to v0.2
Authenticated write features (vote, comment, submit, DM) require re-capture with logged-in session
